channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NPL] National Peroxide: Amit Goriwale Steps Down as Interim CFO
item.description:
National Peroxide Ltd announced that Mr. Amit Goriwale has stepped down from his position as Interim Chief Financial Officer and Interim Chief Risk Officer, effective May 31, 2026. The Board of Directors had approved the appointment of Mr. Chirag Kothari as the Chief Financial Officer and Chief Risk Officer, effective June 1, 2026. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹7 per equity share.

  • Amit Goriwale steps down as Interim CFO & CRO effective May 31, 2026.
  • Chirag Kothari appointed as CFO & CRO effective June 1, 2026.
  • Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹7 per share recommended for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Peroxide Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INDUSTOWER] Indus Towers Board approves Q4 & FY26 audited financial results
item.description:
Indus Towers Limited's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 30, 2026, approved the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. These results were reviewed by the Audit & Risk Management Committee and are in compliance with SEBI regulations. The filing includes the Auditor's Reports with an unmodified opinion. The consolidated results encompass various subsidiaries, including several newly incorporated entities in Dubai, Uganda, Zambia, and Nigeria. The board meeting commenced at 3:05 p.m. IST and concluded at 7:25 p.m. IST.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Consolidated and standalone results were approved.
  • Auditor's Reports received an unmodified opinion.
  • Meeting held on April 30, 2026, lasted over 4 hours.
  • Consolidated results include newly incorporated subsidiaries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indus Towers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NPL] National Peroxide Q4 FY26 Results, ₹7 Dividend, New CFO Appointed
item.description:
National Peroxide's Board of Directors met on April 30, 2026, approving the audited financial results for Q4 and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026, which received an unmodified opinion. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹7 per equity share (70%) for FY26, to be declared at the upcoming AGM. Additionally, Mr. Amit Goriwale stepped down as Interim CFO & CRO, effective May 31, 2026. Mr. Chirag Kothari was appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer and Chief Risk Officer, effective June 1, 2026.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 financial results with unmodified opinion.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹7 per equity share (70%) for FY26.
  • Mr. Amit Goriwale stepped down as Interim CFO & CRO.
  • Mr. Chirag Kothari appointed as new CFO & CRO, effective June 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Peroxide Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDUSTOWER] Indus Towers recommends ₹14/share final dividend for FY26
item.description:
Indus Towers Limited's Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹14 per equity share, with a face value of ₹10 each, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This recommendation is contingent upon approval from shareholders at the forthcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM). If the dividend is approved by shareholders, the company commits to disbursing the payment within 30 days from the date of obtaining shareholder consent. The Board Meeting where this decision was made commenced at 03:05 p.m. IST and concluded at 07:25 p.m. IST.

  • Board recommended ₹14 final dividend per share for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Payment will be made within 30 days of shareholder approval.
  • Each equity share has a face value of ₹10.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indus Towers Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [RAYMONDREL] Raymond Realty Board to consider FY26 Dividend & Audited Results on May 5
item.description:
Raymond Realty Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors will convene on May 5, 2026, to consider and approve the declaration of a dividend for the financial year 2025-26. This agenda item is in addition to the previously intimated consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the fourth quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board meeting on May 5, 2026, to consider dividend.
  • FY2025-26 dividend proposal on the agenda.
  • Audited Q4/FY26 financial results also to be considered.
  • Trading window closed since April 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Raymond Realty Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NSDL] NSDL subsidiary NDML to form new unit for Insurance Repository Business
item.description:
National Securities Depository Limited's Board has granted in-principle approval for its subsidiary, NSDL Database Management Limited (NDML), to establish a new subsidiary. This new entity will be responsible for taking over NDML's existing Insurance Repository Business. The formation and business transfer are contingent upon receiving all requisite regulatory approvals, including from SEBI. This internal restructuring aims to optimize the operational framework for the insurance repository segment.

  • NSDL's board approved subsidiary NDML forming a new unit.
  • New subsidiary will manage Insurance Repository Business.
  • Action requires SEBI and other regulatory approvals.
  • Restructuring aims to optimize business operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Securities Depository Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [JYOTISTRUC] Jyoti Structures Board approves FY26 results, appoints auditors
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Jyoti Structures Ltd. convened on April 30, 2026, and approved the Standalone and Consolidated Audited Financial Statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also gave its assent to Related Party Transactions for the half-year period from October 2025 to March 2026. Key appointments included M/s Bhushan Khot and Co. and M/s K N B J & Associates as Internal Auditors for the Financial Year 2026-27. Additionally, the board approved the appointment of Cost Auditor, Tax Auditor, and Branch Auditors for the same financial year.

  • Board approved Standalone & Consolidated Audited Financial Statements for FY26.
  • Related Party Transactions for H2 FY26 were also approved.
  • M/s Bhushan Khot and Co. appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • M/s K N B J & Associates appointed as additional Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Cost, Tax, and Branch Auditors for FY27 were also appointed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JYOTI STRUCTURES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NSDL] NSDL Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results; Recommends ₹4 Dividend
item.description:
National Securities Depository Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 30, 2026, approved the Audited Financial Statements and Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also recommended a dividend of ₹4 per equity share of face value ₹2 each for FY 2025-26. This dividend recommendation is subject to the approval of shareholders at the company's upcoming 14th Annual General Meeting. The financial results were accompanied by an unmodified opinion from the statutory auditor, K. C. Mehta & Co. LLP.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹4 per equity share for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on financial statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Securities Depository Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDIANB] Indian Bank announces senior management reassignments
item.description:
Indian Bank has announced reassignments for two senior management personnel, effective May 1, 2026. Shri Ganda Rajeswara Reddy, previously Chief General Manager - Recovery, will now serve as Chief General Manager - Estate / BOD / ES to MD & CEO and Secretary to Board. He brings over 33 years of banking experience. Shri Deepak Gupta, who was General Manager – CO: Corporate Credit, has been promoted to Chief General Manager - CO: Corporate Credit, with over 31 years of banking experience. These changes are part of the bank's internal management restructuring.

  • Indian Bank reassigns two senior management roles.
  • Ganda Rajeswara Reddy moves to Chief General Manager - Estate.
  • Deepak Gupta promoted to Chief General Manager - Corporate Credit.
  • Changes are effective from May 1, 2026.
  • Both executives bring over 30 years of banking experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN BANK | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NSDL] NSDL Board Recommends ₹4 Dividend for FY226, Approves Q4/FY26 Results
item.description:
The Board of Directors of National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL) met on April 30, 2026, and approved the Audited Financial Statements and Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The financial results were accompanied by an unmodified opinion from statutory auditor K. C. Mehta & Co. LLP. Additionally, the Board recommended a dividend payment of ₹4 per equity share (face value ₹2 each) for the financial year 2025-26. This dividend recommendation is subject to approval by shareholders at the upcoming 14th Annual General Meeting.

  • NSDL Board approved Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Statutory auditors provided an unmodified opinion on the results.
  • Board recommended a dividend of ₹4 per equity share for FY26.
  • Dividend payment is contingent on shareholder approval at the AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Securities Depository Ltd | Category: Dividend
